subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy letter hath been presented before God, wherein thou didst call upon thy Lord. Excellent indeed is that wherewith thou didst call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امه الله قد حضر بین یدی الله کتابک و فیه نادیت ربک فنعم ما نادیت به
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
